name: Quick Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) in a large bowl.
2. Cut the butter into small pieces and add it to the flour mixture. Mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add the cheddar cheese, milk, and beaten eggs to the flour mixture. Stir until just moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F for about an hour.
6. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
7. Let cool on a wire rack.
